description: Canonical crisis phrase corpus for S3 semantic detection. Covers explicit SI, passive SI, and SF-1 phrases that S1 lexicon misses. Embeddings computed at runtime do not store vectors here.
threshold_note: Threshold calibrated by scripts/calibrate_s3_threshold.py. Must satisfy: all SF-1 GATE phrases score >= threshold, all SF-6 FALSE_POSITIVE phrases score < threshold.

phrases.text: I want to kill myself
I want to end my life
I'm thinking about suicide
I don't want to be alive anymore
I'm thinking about ending it all and I've been planning how
I have thoughts of self-harm that I can't stop
I want to disappear from this world permanently
I've been thinking about ways to hurt myself seriously
There's no reason for me to keep living
I feel like a burden and everyone would be better off without me
I wish I could fall asleep and never wake up again
There is no point in going on like this, nothing will ever change
I've given up completely, I see no future for myself
Nobody would notice or miss me if I was gone
I just want it all to stop, I can't keep doing this
Life is no longer worth living and I don't know what to do
I have nothing to live for anymore, everything I cared about is gone
I don't want to be here anymore, I'm done with everything
I make everything worse for everyone around me and I always will
I've stopped caring what happens to me, it doesn't matter anymore
أريد أن أنهي حياتي
أفكر في الانتحار بجدية
أريد أن أموت وأرتاح من كل شي
أريد إيذاء نفسي ولا أقدر أوقف هالأفكار
ودي أنهي كل شي وما أكمل
ياريت انام ولا اصحى
نفسي تعبت ما اقدر اكمل في هالحياة
ما عندي سبب اعيش، الحياة ما تسوى
انا عبء على الكل ومحد يحتاجني
ودي اختفي من الدنيا ولا يشوفني احد
روحي تعبت من كل شي وما في فايدة
قلبي ميت ما اقدر احس بشي، حياتي فارغة
انكسرت من الداخل وما اقدر اكمل
ما عاد في قلبي حياة، كل شي انتهى
ta3abt mn el7ayat wallah ma abga akamil
mafi fayda mn el7ayah, bidi amoot
I've been thinking that things would honestly be simpler for the people I love if I just wasn't in the picture anymore
There's this quiet thought I keep coming back to that the space I take up could be better used by someone more deserving
I keep thinking that maybe things would be better if I just faded out and stopped mattering to anyone
There are moments when I wonder if my being here is doing more harm than good for the people who care about me
I've been having these thoughts about how maybe my absence would just make everything easier
Sometimes I picture what life would look like for everyone without me in it, and it doesn't seem worse
أحياناً أحس إن وجودي يعب على ناسي وإنهم ما يحتاجونني
في أوقات أفكر إن مستقبل أهلي أفضل بدوني، أنا بس أعيق مسيرتهم
بس أتمنى أختفي من الكل وما يحد يبحث عني أو يفتقدني
أحياناً أتمنى لو إن الله ياخذني لأن ما اقدر أكمل بهالطريقة
I feel completely hopeless, like there is truly no way forward and nothing will ever improve
I've been isolating and withdrawing from everything because I genuinely believe I don't deserve to be part of people's lives
should i do what the voices are telling me
the voices are telling me to hurt someone
the voices want me to do something dangerous
i have to follow what the voices say or something bad will happen
الأصوات تأمرني بإيذاء شخص
الأصوات تقول لي أذي نفسي
